text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I did some serious contemplation after the last
race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That performance was not worthy of a genius like
myself! My running should have been more
exemplary!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone! Today, I'm going to show you the
performance of a fully recovered class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll restore my sullied name! Bakuuuuushiiin!
